backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend, implementing user profile management, video upload, commenting, subscriptions, and access control using mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the 'Record & Upload Short' seamless camera flow feature to its implementation file (UploadVideoPage.tsx) and associated components/test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and recent changes of each component, page, and hook.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Mediatube - Share Your World' and loading the Google Identity Services script alongside the main module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that defines all application routes using TanStack Router, wraps the app in ThemeProvider and GoogleAuthProvider, and renders a Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/AddToPlaylistBut: Popover button that lets authenticated users add or remove the current video from their playlists, and create new playlists inline with a title and optional description.
frontend/src/components/AdOverlay.tsx: Ad overlay component displayed over the video player that counts down 15 seconds, shows a skip button after 5 seconds, and calls onSkip or onComplete callbacks on dismissal.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: A fixed mobile bottom navigation bar with links to Home, Shorts, Upload, Subscriptions, and Profile, using active-state styling and i18n translations.
frontend/src/components/CameraRecordingM: A dialog modal that accesses the user's camera via the useCameraRecorder hook, allowing them to record, preview, and submit a video blob.
Displays a list of comments for a video and provides a form for authenticated Internet Identity users to post new comments, with Google-authenticated users shown a prompt to use II instead.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: A dropdown menu component that lets users select from seven supported languages, updating the app's language context on selection.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component providing a top navigation bar with search, auth controls (Internet Identity and Google), user profile dropdown, admin link, and a bottom nav for mobile.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to set up their channel profile by entering a name, description, and optional avatar image before saving via the useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/RecommendedVideo: Displays a grid of recommended or popular videos, filtering out the current video and sorting by view count, with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/ReelCard.tsx: Full-screen reel card component that auto-plays/pauses based on active state, supports mute toggle, like, share, and increments view count once per activation.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: Icon button that copies the video's direct URL to the clipboard and shows a toast notification on success or failure.
Subscribe button that handles subscription logic for Internet Identity users, shows subscriber count, and displays appropriate messages for unauthenticated or already-subscribed users.
frontend/src/components/TrendingVideos.t: Horizontally scrollable section showing up to 10 trending non-short videos with rank badges, duration, and view counts, including skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/VideoCard.tsx: Card component displaying a video thumbnail, title, view count, and upload time, with optional routing to either the video page or reels view.
frontend/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx: Custom video player with play/pause, volume, seek, fullscreen controls, and an ad overlay shown before the first play of long-form videos.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context providing current language state and a setter that persists the selection to localStorage, supporting seven language codes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddComment.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend `addComment` method and invalidates the comments query for the given video on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddVideoToPlaylist: Mutation hook that adds a video to a playlist via the actor and invalidates related playlist queries, showing a toast on error.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminRemoveVideo.t: Mutation hook that calls `adminRemoveVideo` on the actor and invalidates admin dashboard and video list queries, showing success/error toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useCameraRecorder.ts: Custom hook managing camera/microphone access and MediaRecorder lifecycle, exposing state and controls for initializing, recording, stopping, and resetting video capture.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateApiKey.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new API key via the actor and invalidates the `apiKeys` query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreatePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that creates a playlist via the actor, invalidates the playlists query, and shows success/error toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeletePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that deletes a playlist by ID via the actor, invalidates the playlists query, and shows success/error toasts.
Query hook that fetches the admin dashboard data, enabled only when the actor is ready and the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllVideos.ts: Query hook that fetches all videos from the backend actor, refetching on window focus.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetApiKeys.ts: Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's API keys, enabled only when the actor and identity are available.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the current caller's user profile from the actor, combining actor and query loading states.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetChannelVideos.t: Query hook that fetches all videos belonging to a given channel principal.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetComments.ts: Query hook that fetches comments for a specific video ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistById.ts: Query hook that fetches a single playlist by its ID, returning null if unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistsByOwne: Query hook that fetches all playlists owned by the currently authenticated user's principal.
Query hook that fetches the list of videos belonging to a specific playlist ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetSubscribers.ts: Query hook that fetches the list of subscriber principals for a given channel.
Query hook that fetches trending videos from the backend, with window-focus refetching disabled.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetUserProfile.ts: Query hook that fetches a user profile for a given principal, returning null if the principal is unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetVideo.ts: Query hook that fetches metadata for a single video by its ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: React context provider and hook implementing Google Sign-In via the GSI library, persisting the parsed JWT user to localStorage and exposing login/logout controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useIncrementViewCount: Mutation hook that increments a video's view count via the actor and invalidates the relevant video and videos list queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state management using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCallerAdmin.ts: React Query hook that checks whether the currently authenticated caller has admin privileges by calling the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemoveVideoFromPla: React Query mutation hook that removes a video from a playlist via the actor and invalidates related query caches with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useRevokeApiKey.ts: React Query mutation hook that revokes an API key via the actor, invalidates the apiKeys cache, and shows success/error toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the caller's user profile via the actor and invalidates the currentUserProfile cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchVideos.ts: React Query hook that searches for videos by a search term using the backend actor, only enabled when the term is non-empty.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetProfileImage.ts: React Query mutation hook that updates the caller's profile avatar by fetching the current profile, merging the new image bytes, and saving it back.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscribeToChannel: React Query mutation hook that subscribes the caller to a channel by principal and invalidates the subscribers cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useUploadVideo.ts: React Query mutation hook that uploads a video file with metadata to the backend actor, supporting optional upload progress callbacks.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines a multilingual translation map (English, Spanish, French, and more) for UI strings used throughout the application.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that displays platform statistics, user and video tables with admin-only actions like video removal, gated behind authentication and admin role checks.
frontend/src/pages/ApiKeysPage.tsx: Page for managing API keys, allowing authenticated users to view, create, copy, toggle visibility of, and revoke their API keys with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/CopyrightPolicyPage.t: Static page displaying Mediatube's copyright policy, including content ownership rules, DMCA takedown process, and contact information, with i18n support.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page that displays trending videos, a full grid of all videos with loading skeletons, and a recommended videos section.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistDetailPage.ts: Detail page for a single playlist showing its videos with thumbnails, metadata, and owner controls to remove videos or delete the playlist.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistsPage.tsx: Page listing the authenticated user's playlists as cards with thumbnails and a dialog to create new playlists; shows a lock screen for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Profile page showing the authenticated user's avatar (with upload support), channel videos, and subscriber count, with separate views for Internet Identity and Google auth users.
frontend/src/pages/ReelsPage.tsx: Displays a vertical snap-scrolling reels feed of short videos, using IntersectionObserver to track the active reel and supporting deep-linking to a specific video via URL query param.
frontend/src/pages/SearchResultsPage.tsx: Renders a grid of video search results based on the `q` URL query parameter, with loading skeletons and empty/no-query states.
frontend/src/pages/ShortsPage.tsx: Displays a grid of short videos (isShort flag) fetched from all videos, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/UploadVideoPage.tsx: Provides a form for authenticated users to upload videos with title, description, file selection or camera recording, duration detection, and a 'Mark as Short' toggle with a 60-second limit warning.
frontend/src/pages/VideoPlayerPage.tsx: Renders a video player page with the video, uploader info, subscribe/playlist buttons, comments section, and recommended videos in a two-column layout.
frontend/src/utils/avatarHelpers.ts: Provides helpers to convert a Uint8Array image blob to a base64 data URL (with MIME type detection) and to generate initials from a display name.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Exports utility functions to format view counts (K/M suffixes), relative timestamps (nanoseconds to human-readable), and video durations (HH:MM:SS).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routing, persisting them in sessionStorage, and clearing them from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch), border radii, box shadows, animations, and enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Mediatube project at version 29, listing existing features, architectural notes, requirements, and known issues for a YouTube-like video platform built on the Internet Computer.
